message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry info from the SPRINT-Nav X LNavUTC
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft
UTC time tag (from LNavUTC)
Latitude (from LNavUTC)
Longitude (from LNavUTC)
Depth delow sea level (from LNavUTC)
Height above sea bed
Roll (from LNavUTC)
Pitch (from LNavUTC)
Heading (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle North-velocity (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle East-velocity (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle Down-velocity (from LNavUTC)
Angular rate about Vehicle Fwd axis (from LNavUTC)
Angular rate about Vehicle Stbd axis (from LNavUTC)
Angular rate about Vehicle Dwn axis (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle Fwd-acceleration (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle Stbd-acceleration (from LNavUTC)
Vehicle Dwn-acceleration (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
1σ depth error (from LNavUTC)
1σ level error about North (from LNavUTC)
1σ level error about East (from LNavUTC)
1σ heading error (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis (from LNavUTC)
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis (from LNavUTC)
1σ down velocity error (from LNavUTC)
Status flags 16 bits
The alignment status flag of the SPRINT-Nav X INS (aligned: 1, not aligned: 0)

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_DVL_PD4_TELEMETRY
message.description: Telemetry info from the SPRINT-Nav X DVL PD4
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft
The DVL data identifier
The data structure of the message (PD4: 0, PD5: 1)
The number of bytes sent in this data structure, not including the checksum
Defines the DVL hardware/firmware configuration
Time of arrival of the data into the SPRINT-Nav X (microseconds instrument uptime)
Time of trigger when the SPRINT-Nav X is triggering the DVL (microseconds instrument uptime)
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to the east (X). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to the north (Y). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion up (Z). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity error of the vessel in relation to the bottom in mm/s.
The validity of the east (X) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the north (Y) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the up (Z) velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the error velocity in relation to the bottom (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 1
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 2
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 3
The vertical range from the ADCP to the bottom as determined by each beam 4
The validity of beam 1 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 2 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 3 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
The validity of beam 4 vertical range (vertical range valid: 1, vertical range not valid: 0)
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 bottom status
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to east (X). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion to north (Y) LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s. Positive values indicate vessel motion up (Z). LSD = 1 mm/s
The velocity error of the vessel in relation to the water-mass reference layer in mm/s
The validity of the east (X) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the north (Y) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the up (Z) velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The validity of the error velocity in relation to the water-mass reference layer (velocity valid: 1, velocity not valid: 0)
The starting boundary (near surface) of the water-mass reference layer
The ending boundary (near bottom) of the water-mass reference layer
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 reference layer status
The time in hours of first ping
The time in minutes of first ping
The time in seconds of first ping
The time in hundredths of first ping
Bitmap indicating DVL PD4 ADCP built in test function results
The manual or calculated speed of sound information
The water temperature at the transducer head
The checksum validity of the PD4 data (checksum valid: 1, checksum not valid: 0)

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SET_SNX_CONFIG_CMD
message.description: An ASCII config command to send to the SPRINT-Nav X device to query or change its current configuration loaded in memory
message.field: Configuration command to send to the SPRINT-Nav device
Id of SNX device to send the configuration command to. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SET_SNX_CONFIG_CMD_ACK
message.description: An ASCII reply to the config command sent to the SPRINT-Nav X device
message.field: A device reply to the configuration command to sent to the SPRINT-Nav device

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_GGA_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: GGA observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Residual latitude
Residual longitude
Residual depth
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_SUSBL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: SUSBL observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Beacon Id (Address)
Observation Type
Residual latitude
Residual longitude
Residual depth
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_DVL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: DVL observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
System time of validity
Group ID to associate observations that are batched processed together
Observation message type
Sound speed used by Kalman filter
Residual Vx or Beam 1
Residual Vy or Beam 2
Residual Vz or Beam 3
Residual Beam 4
Beam rejection status

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_PDEPTH_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: PDEPTH observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Observation Type
Residual depth
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_BIST_TELEMETRY
message.description: BIST IMU status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time
FW Version: Major, Minor, Interim, Build.
IMU Bits
Comms Bits
CCA Bits
AHRS Bits
AINS Bits

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_SET_AIDING_DEVICE
message.description: Commands the SPRINT-Nav X device to enable or disable accepting aiding inputs sourced from a specified device
message.field: Id of SNX device to send the configuration command to. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Enable or disable input aiding to the SPRINT-Nav device (enable: 1, disable: 0)

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_SET_AIDING_DEVICE_ACK
message.description: Command acknowledge from setting the SPRINT-Nav X aiding source
message.field: Id of SNX device to send the configuration command to. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
A device reply to the configuration command to set the SPRINT-Nav aiding device

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_SVS_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: SVS observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Observation Type
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_LBL_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: LBL observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Beacon Id (Address)
Sound speed
Residual Range
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_XPOS_OBSERVATION_TELEMETRY
message.description: XPOS observation status telemetry from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System Time of first data recieve
Rejection status bits
Distance between observation and expectation
Either 0 (Command) or 1 (Message)
Residual latitude
Residual longitude
Residual depth
System time of validity

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_VST_TELEMETRY
message.description: Valeport Sensor Telegram data (from the Valeport Mini SVS sensor) from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Time of arrival of the data into the SPRINT-Nav X (microseconds instrument uptime)
Sound speed

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_PSONNAV_TELEMETRY
message.description: PSONNAV provides navigation status which consists of a UTC timestamp, position, depth, velocity, attitude and heading with associated accuracy estimates from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Message id (E.g $PSONNAV)
UTC timestamp of navigation status
2 fixed digits degrees, 2 fixed digits minutes, variable digits of decimal minutes (WGS 84)
Direction of latitude: N (North) or S (South)
3 fixed digits degrees, 2 fixed digits minutes, variable digits of decimal minutes (WGS 84)
Direction of longitude: E (East) or W (West)
Major Axis position error ellipse
Minor Axis position error ellipse
Direction of major Axis position error ellipse
Position Status: A is Valid, V is Invalid
Depth
Depth standard deviation
Roll
Pitch
Heading
Heading standard deviation
Orientation status: A is Valid, V is Invalid
Sensor status and solution

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_TRG_TELEMETRY
message.description: PSONTRG logs and records the 1 PPS input or any other trigger input or output such as DVLs and responders, from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Message id (E.g $PSONTRG)
Trigger time in SNX System Time, seconds from start up, resolution to μs
Trigger time converted from SNX Time System, seconds from start up, resolution to μs. (hhmmss.ssssss)
Trigger port number (1 to 4)
Trigger direction: A = input, B = output
Sign of the trigger edge: “+” or “-”
Width of the trigger pulse in seconds. Note: field is empty if the trigger is an input
Period of the output pulse in seconds. Note: field is empty if the trigger is an input
Trigger port number (1 to 4)
Trigger direction: 1 = input, 0 = output

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_TMS_TELEMETRY
message.description: TMS provides time system data from the SNX
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
System time (and message time tag)
UTC time in seconds since midnight 1970.01.01
Time since last accepted UTC time update, e.g. from ZDA/PPS
Expected standard deviation of UTC time field
Currently used source of UTC sync
0: PPS valid on falling edge (low to high voltage). 1: PPS valid on rising edge
LS byte of ZDA message count
LS byte of PPS message count
LS byte of ZDA message rejection count
LS byte of PPS signal rejection count
LS byte of accepted PPS/ZDA pairs
LS byte of UTC filter reset count

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_XPOS_AID_CMD
message.description: Supplies XPOS position aid to SPRINTNAV
message.field: Id of SNX device that is reporting telemetry. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Estimated latitiude
Estimated longitude
error elipse error major axis
error elipse error minor axis
error elipse orientation
depth delow sea level
depth standard deviation

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_SNX_XPOS_AID_ACK
message.description: Ack for XPOS aiding sent to SPRINTNAV
message.field: Id of SNX device to send the configuration command to. Either SPRINT-Nav fore or aft device id
Status is 1 if xpos is accepted, 0 otherwise
Sent latitiude
Sent longitude
